name: Latarza
description: Latarza is a Greed Island player who preys on new players. He wears a tanktop, baggy pants and a pair of headphones. His afro-textured hair is tied into a number of upright bunches on top of his head. When Killua has just entered the game, Latarza casts the spell card Trace on him then immediately flees to Masadora city using the Return spell card when he feels that the kid is dangerous. The tattoo on his right shoulder "雷" is the kanji for Thunder, while the one on his left shoulder "風" is the kanji for Wind.    ~!Latarza later is killed by Feitan and Phinks.!~
